description: Reads the controller FrooxEngine class type and it's model identifier for a User for a hand Side.

fields.TargetUser: The user this component is reading controller info from
fields.ControllerSide: The side (left or right) controller this component is reading info from.
fields.ControllerType: The type of the controller ``TargetUser`` is using on their ``ControllerSide`` hand.
fields.ControllerDeviceModel: The device model of the controller ``TargetUser`` is using on their ``ControllerSide`` hand.
